welcome_offer.description: You may be eligible for as high as 100,000 Membership Rewards® points after spending $6,000 in eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible.

earning_rates.notes: On up to $50,000 in purchases per calendar year, then 1x

annual_credits.name: Dining Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $10 statement credit monthly at Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly,inline, Seamless, or at participating Shake Shack locations. Enrollment required.

annual_credits.name: Uber Cash
annual_credits.description: Up to $10 in Uber Cash each month for U.S. rides and orders (including Uber Eats). Enrollment required.

other_benefits: Plan It® (split purchases into monthly payments)
